ns0:entry.ns0:title: WangRongsheng/awesome-LLM-resources
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WangRongsheng/awesome-LLM-resources
Language: unknown
🧑‍🚀 全世界最好的LLM资料总结（多模态生成、Agent、辅助编程、AI审稿、数据处理、模型训练、模型推理、o1 模型、MCP、小语言模型、视觉语言模型） | Summary of the world's best LLM resources.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mtdvio/every-programmer-should-know

ns0:entry.ns0:title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
Language: unknown
A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: okcar-os/android
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/okcar-os/android
Language: unknown
An open-source system designed for in-car entertainment. Use the CarPlay protocol to enable audio and video transmission between an Android smartphone and in-car entertainment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: steven2358/awesome-generative-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/steven2358/awesome-generative-ai

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge

A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
Language: unknown
FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models
